changeSet.author: calendar-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calendar_event` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户账号', `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '事件标题', `content` TEXT COMMENT '事件内容/记事详情', `event_date` DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '事件日期', `event_time` TIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '事件时间(可为空)', `event_type` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '类型: 1-待办 2-记事 3-纪念日', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态: 1-待完成 2-已完成 3-已过期', `priority` TINYINT DEFAULT 2 COMMENT '优先级: 1-低 2-中 3-高', `tags` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '标签(JSON数组)', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '删除标记', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_cal_event_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_cal_event_date` (`event_date`), KEY `idx_cal_event_account_date` (`account`, `event_date`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='事件/记事表';

changeSet.author: calendar-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calendar_reminder` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `event_id` BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联事件ID', `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户账号', `remind_time` DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '提醒时间', `remind_before` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '提前多少分钟提醒', `notification_type` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '通知方式(wechat,sms,dingtalk)', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态: 1-待发送 2-已发送 3-发送失败', `retry_count` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '重试次数', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '删除标记', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_cal_reminder_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_cal_reminder_time` (`remind_time`), KEY `idx_cal_reminder_status` (`status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='提醒表';

changeSet.author: calendar-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calendar_cycle_plan` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户账号', `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '计划标题', `content` TEXT COMMENT '计划内容', `cycle_type` TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '周期类型: 1-每周 2-每月 3-自定义', `cycle_config` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '周期配置(JSON)', `cron_expression` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Cron表达式(自定义时使用)', `start_date` DATE NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期', `end_date` DATE DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束日期(可为空,表示永久)', `notification_type` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '通知方式', `remind_time` TIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '每次提醒的时间点', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '状态: 1-启用 2-暂停 3-已结束', `next_trigger_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '下次触发时间', `last_trigger_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '上次触发时间', `quartz_job_key` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Quartz任务Key', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '删除标记', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_cal_cycle_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_cal_cycle_status` (`status`), KEY `idx_cal_cycle_next_trigger` (`next_trigger_time`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='周期计划表';

changeSet.author: calendar-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calendar_notification_log` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户账号', `source_type` TINYINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '来源类型: 1-事件提醒 2-周期计划', `source_id` BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '来源ID', `notification_type` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '通知类型', `title` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '通知标题', `content` TEXT COMMENT '通知内容', `status` TINYINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '状态: 1-成功 2-失败', `error_message` TEXT COMMENT '错误信息', `send_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '发送时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_cal_notif_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_cal_notif_source` (`source_type`, `source_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='通知日志表';

changeSet.author: calendar-app
calendar-app
calendar-app
calendar-app
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calendar_app_notification` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户账号', `title` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT '通知标题', `content` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '通知内容', `remind_time` DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '提醒时间', `source_type` TINYINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '来源: 1-事件提醒 2-周期计划', `source_id` BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '来源ID', `is_read` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否已读: 0-否 1-是', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_cal_app_notif_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_cal_app_notif_time` (`remind_time`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='应用内通知表';
